ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the site */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the device is installed */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., energy meter, power factor meter) */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data type */,
  "data_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Validity of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marks" (
  "mark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mark */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point associated with the mark */,
  "mark_name" TEXT /* Name of the mark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mark */,
  "mark_type" TEXT /* Type of the mark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, site administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point associated with the energy data */,
  "watts" REAL /* Energy consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage measurement in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current measurement in amps */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "energy_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the energy data */,
  "energy_validity" INTEGER /* Validity of the energy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site associated with the configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_config_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point associated with the version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data_versions" (
  "energy_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy version */,
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data associated with the version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_versions_energy_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("energy_id")
)
